_comment: Expected REDUCE output for structural-dedup.input.json. Assertions that matter for manual eval: (1) each (content, suggested_section) collapses to ONE entry; (2) source_chat_count = number of distinct source_chats that surfaced it; (3) confidence PROMOTED by count only — N>=3 -> high, N==2 -> medium, N==1 unchanged; (4) NO entry has a `needs_review` key — REDUCE never sets it, never auto-approves (overview I6/§8.7). At equal confidence + equal evidence the SPECIFIC retained source_chat/source_date is implementation-defined (ties broken by first-seen); do not assert on which one survives, only on the fields below.

expected_candidates._note: low -> high because N>=3 distinct source_chats; needs_review intentionally absent
low -> medium because N==2; needs_review intentionally absent
single source; confidence unchanged (already high); not laundered
